turns.svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="mirrorGlass" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="0">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#bfe8ff" stop-opacity="0.65"/>
      <stop offset="0.5" stop-color="#d6f4ff" stop-opacity="0.35"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#9fdcff" stop-opacity="0.55"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="frame" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#444"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#111"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="shine" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="0">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#ffffff" stop-opacity="0.65"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#ffffff" stop-opacity="0"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>

  <!-- Background -->
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="512" height="512" fill="#0b1220"/>
  <radialGradient id="bgGlow" cx="35%" cy="20%" r="70%">
    <stop offset="0" stop-color="#294a7a" stop-opacity="0.35"/>
    <stop offset="1" stop-color="#0b1220" stop-opacity="0"/>
  </radialGradient>
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="512" height="512" fill="url(#bgGlow)"/>

  <!-- Mirror frame -->
  <g transform="translate(0,0)">
    <rect x="120" y="70" width="272" height="372" rx="26" fill="url(#frame)"/>
    <rect x="135" y="86" width="242" height="340" rx="20" fill="#0e1a33" opacity="0.95"/>
    <rect x="148" y="98" width="216" height="316" rx="16" fill="url(#mirrorGlass)" stroke="#7fd6ff" stroke-opacity="0.45" stroke-width="2"/>

    <!-- Light/shine streaks -->
    <path d="M170 130 C210 110, 260 108, 320 120" fill="none" stroke="url(#shine)" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.45"/>
    <path d="M160 200 C215 175, 270 178, 330 200" fill="none" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-opacity="0.12" stroke-width="5" stroke-linecap="round"/>

    <!-- Ripples / reflection texture -->
    <g stroke="#7fd6ff" stroke-opacity="0.25" fill="none">
      <path d="M175 240 C205 225, 245 225, 275 240 S345 265, 330 280" stroke-width="2"/>
      <path d="M165 275 C200 260, 245 260, 285 275 S350 300, 340 315" stroke-width="2"/>
      <path d="M180 310 C210 295, 250 295, 290 310 S345 335, 330 350" stroke-width="2"/>
    </g>

    <!-- Person silhouette in front of mirror (left side) -->
    <g transform="translate(0,0)" opacity="0.95">
      <!-- torso -->
      <path d="M170 330 C168 292, 190 275, 210 270 C212 268, 214 266, 214 262 C214 240, 200 226, 200 214 C200 195, 215 178, 236 178 C257 178, 272 195, 272 214 C272 226, 258 240, 258 262 C258 266, 260 268, 262 270 C282 275, 304 292, 302 330 Z" fill="#0a1326"/>
      <!-- head -->
      <circle cx="236" cy="206" r="22" fill="#0a1326"/>
      <!-- hair/shoulder highlight (no text) -->
      <path d="M214 210 C220 186, 250 186, 256 210" fill="none" stroke="#7fd6ff" stroke-opacity="0.18" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    </g>

    <!-- Reflected silhouette inside mirror (right side via symmetry) -->
    <g transform="translate(0,0)" opacity="0.95">
      <!-- head -->
      <circle cx="274" cy="206" r="21" fill="#0b1630" opacity="0.85"/>
      <circle cx="274" cy="206" r="21" fill="#bfe8ff" opacity="0.10"/>
      <!-- torso (mirrored) -->
      <path d="M222 330 C220 298, 236 286, 250 280 C252 278, 254 276, 254 272 C254 252, 244 240, 244 228 C244 210, 257 196, 274 196 C291 196, 304 210, 304 228 C304 240, 294 252, 294 272 C294 276, 296 278, 298 280 C312 286, 328 298, 326 330 Z" fill="#0b1630" opacity="0.78"/>

      <!-- facial/light rim -->
      <path d="M258 214 C260 198, 288 198, 292 214" fill="none" stroke="#7fd6ff" stroke-opacity="0.18" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"/>

      <!-- mirrored shimmer bands -->
      <g fill="none" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-opacity="0.12" stroke-linecap="round">
        <path d="M205 252 C235 235, 268 235, 299 252" stroke-width="4"/>
        <path d="M200 286 C233 270, 269 270, 304 286" stroke-width="3"/>
      </g>
    </g>

    <!-- Mirror border highlights -->
    <path d="M148 112 C160 95, 182 86, 210 86" fill="none" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-opacity="0.22" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <path d="M350 98 C365 112, 364 150, 350 165" fill="none" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-opacity="0.14" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Subtle floor glow -->
  <ellipse cx="256" cy="455" rx="170" ry="36" fill="#3aa7ff" opacity="0.08"/>
  <ellipse cx="256" cy="465" rx="120" ry="25" fill="#7fd6ff" opacity="0.06"/>
</svg>

messages.content:
You are a drawing agent in a one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: svg.

Rules:
1) Draw the target word using only SVG graphics.
2) Output one complete <svg>...</svg> string.
3) Do not include text labels, letters, or numbers in the drawing.
4) Keep the SVG simple and valid. No scripts, no foreignObject.
5) Use a 512x512 canvas.

Output schema:
{ "svg": "string" }

message.reasoning:
**Creating reflection concept**

I need to design a concept of reflection without any text. I'll go with a mirror showing a silhouette of a person alongside light rays, using simple shapes on a 512 canvas. The plan involves drawing a rectangle for the mirror, adding a frame, and creating a silhouette using circles and paths. I might also include a reflection effect with water ripples, ensuring that everything is in SVG format with no text labels, and returning JSON only.

messages.content:
You are the guesser in a visual one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: guesses.

Rules:
1) You receive one JPEG image of a drawing.
2) Return exactly 20 one-word guesses in order of confidence (best guess first).
3) The order is important and will be scored by first correct position.
4) Do not repeat guesses.
5) Each guess must be EN-US one word, no spaces.
6) Avoid punctuation and numbers.

Output schema:
{ "guesses": ["string", "... exactly 20 items ..."] }

content.text: {"language":"EN-US","maxHints":20,"note":"Return 20 ordered guesses. Position 1 is the highest-confidence guess."}
